final_prompt.prompt:
Generate a 9:16 vertical screenshot of a Douyin livestream featuring "神仙姐姐".

Style/medium: mobile UI screenshot, Douyin livestream interface mockup, photorealistic portrait
Composition: vertical 9:16 frame, phone screen capture aesthetic, subject centered in livestream window
Subject: "神仙姐姐" (刘亦菲-style elegant Chinese actress) holding a sign with both hands, warm smile, soft makeup, flowing hair
Scene/backdrop: typical Douyin livestream room with blurred background, viewer count and comment section visible at bottom, gift icons on right side
Lighting/mood: soft ring light illuminating face, warm and inviting atmosphere for late-night chat session
Color palette: warm skin tones against cool UI grays and Douyin brand accents
Text (verbatim): "今晚直播，欢迎来参亦菲畅聊！"
Constraints: must look like authentic Douyin screenshot with proper UI elements; text on sign must be legible
Avoid: distorted fingers, unreadable text, generic stock photo faces, watermark
